message:
fix(fcall): fix FCALL execution by transforming register_function into callable Lua

Strip #!lua header and transform redis.register_function('name', func)
calls into named function definitions before passing to the Lua evaluator.
This fixes FCALL which was previously broken due to invalid Lua syntax
from the library header and undefined register_function calls.

FCALL now correctly executes functions that return values, use KEYS/ARGV,
and call redis.call() for data operations. 9 new conformance cases verify
argument passing, integer returns, and redis.call integration (1735 total).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
